title: AXRRuleType
description: RRule class type representing recurrence rule instances from the rrule.js library, providing comprehensive methods for querying, generating, and manipulating recurring date patterns

types.title: AXRRuleType
types.description: RRule class instance from the 'rrule' package. Provides methods to query recurrence patterns and generate date sequences.

methods.name: all
methods.content: all(iterator?: (d: Date, len: number) => boolean): Date[]
methods.description: Returns all occurrences of the recurrence rule

methods.name: between
methods.content: between(after: Date, before: Date, inc?: boolean, iterator?: (d: Date, len: number) => boolean): Date[]

methods.name: before
methods.content: before(dt: Date, inc?: boolean): Date | null
methods.description: Returns the last occurrence before the given date

methods.name: after
methods.content: after(dt: Date, inc?: boolean): Date | null
methods.description: Returns the first occurrence after the given date

methods.name: count
methods.description: Returns the total number of occurrences

methods.name: toString
methods.description: Converts the rule to RFC 2445 string format

methods.name: toText
methods.content: toText(gettext?: GetText, language?: Language, dateFormatter?: DateFormatter): string
methods.description: Converts the rule to human-readable text

methods.name: clone
methods.description: Creates a copy of the RRule instance

properties.name: options
properties.description: The parsed options used by this rule

properties.name: origOptions
properties.description: The original options passed to the constructor

inherited.name: nativeElement
inherited.description: The root native element. Inherited from NXComponent

sections.title: Class Definition
sections.description: Canonical RRule class type from rrule.js library
